title: centaurea paniculata var. castellana
intro: Centaurea paniculata var. castellana, also known as Castellana knapweed, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Castellana knapweed include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Castellana knapweed often involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
